ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy reading */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the energy reading */,
  "home_power" REAL /* Power consumption of the home in kW */,
  "solar_power" REAL /* Power generated by solar panels in kW */,
  "powerwall_power" REAL /* Power stored in or drawn from Powerwall battery in kW */,
  "grid_power" REAL /* Power drawn from or supplied to the grid in kW */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the reading */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_readings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., solar panel, Powerwall battery, smart meter) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., homeowner, building manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the energy plan (e.g., recommended energy usage patterns) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_energy_consumption" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption in kW */,
  "forecasted_energy_generation" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation in kW */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_energy_consumption" REAL /* Recommended energy consumption in kW */,
  "recommended_energy_generation" REAL /* Recommended energy generation in kW */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the reading */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reading */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the device in V */,
  "current" REAL /* Current of the device in A */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the device in kW */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the device in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
